nasb.text: And He answered and said, “Have you not read that He who created them from the beginning made them male and female,

esv.text: He answered, “Have you not read that he who created them from the beginning made them male and female,

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“你们没有读过吗？太初，造物主造了男人和女人，并且说，

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“你们难道没有读过吗？造物主从起初就把人造成男的和女的。
